Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

Class PrimitiveCharacterVerifierImpl

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectVerifier<S,​V,​T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractComparableVerifier<PrimitiveCharacterVerifier,​PrimitiveCharacterValidator,​Character>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.PrimitiveCharacterVerifierImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleComparableVerifier<PrimitiveCharacterVerifier,​Character>, ExtensibleObjectVerifier<PrimitiveCharacterVerifier,​Character>, ExtensiblePrimitiveVerifier<PrimitiveCharacterVerifier,​Character>, PrimitiveCharacterVerifier
public final class PrimitiveCharacterVerifierImpl
extends AbstractComparableVerifier<PrimitiveCharacterVerifier,​PrimitiveCharacterValidator,​Character>
implements PrimitiveCharacterVerifier
Default implementation of PrimitiveCharacterVerifier.
